segments.text: On a swing and then taking 80% off on a second day or a third day, and then keeping rest for whatever more it can give.
Now this is an advanced technique, and beginners are going to have lot of problems trying to make this work.
So this particular video is not going to get into this kind of advanced techniques.
Advanced techniques will be something which we'll have in our separate section in the guide, which is is talking about advanced technique for traders who already have good win rate.
If you don't have good win rate, and if you try advanced technique, you're just going to go and make it more complicated.
But there is a better way to manage this position also by partially peeling off profits also.
Partial peeling off profit makes sense only if you are putting in large size positions.

If you are not putting in big positions of 60% of your account, And if you're just putting a small amount of high 10% of your account, and then you fill, then it's not really going to help you increase your profitability.
It is just going to mess up with your thinking.
And all the time, you'll be asking question.
Sometimes you're gonna fill too early.
Sometimes you're not gonna fill at the right time.
And, as a result of that, you're just going to suboptimize the trade.
So suffice it to say, there is an advanced technique to manage this kind of trades and increase your profitability, but that I would leave it for traders who have mastered this setup.
And after mastering and trading it for a couple of years, move into advanced tactics like eighty twenty, filling the position, or like reverse pyramid ring, as it is called.
